items.name: 円空作「観音菩薩坐像」1体
items.description: 1体。寛文期（1661年～1673年）の間に製作された円空作像の代表的作品。北海道立近代美術館「円空展」ほか、道外の美術館等にも展示(貸出）実績も多い。

en.name_en: One Seated Statue of Kannon Bodhisattva Made by Enku
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of one seated statue of Kannon (Avalokitesvara) Bodhisattva made by Enku. It is a town-designated cultural property of Oshamambe Town, designated on 2011-03-23.

items.name: アイヌ民族衣装「ルウンペ」2着、「チヂリ」2着／計4着
items.description: 「ルウンペ」2着、「チヂリ」2着／計4着。長万部に在住されていたアイヌ民族の方々が実際に着用していた衣服。

en.name_romaji: Ainu Minzoku Ishō "Ruunpe" Nichaku, "Chijiri" Nichaku / Kei Yonchaku
en.name_en: Ainu Traditional Garments: Two Ruunpe and Two Chijiri (Four in Total)
en.description_en: This is a folk cultural property (tangible) consisting of Ainu traditional garments: two ruunpe and two chijiri, four in total. It is a town-designated cultural property of Oshamambe Town, designated on 2011-03-23.

items.name: 丸木舟
items.description: 昭和50年の台風による水害で偶然発見された丸木舟。長さに対して幅が広いという特徴がある。

en.description_en: This is a folk cultural property (tangible) consisting of a dugout canoe. It is a town-designated cultural property of Oshamambe Town, designated on 2011-03-23.
